summary: ANDROID ⛔ CLOUD ☁️ Policy locked on phone but with wrong value
scenario: Cloud policy locks a setting on VFree20 device but applies the phone's previous value instead of the cloud-set value for Sensors & Presence category settings.
description_clean: When a policy is set via Lens Cloud to lock a setting on a connected VFree20 device, the setting becomes locked on the mobile app but retains the phone's previously selected value instead of applying the value set in the cloud policy. Expected: Sensors & Presence category settings should be lockable to a specific value and that cloud-set value should be enforced on the device.
steps: Open Lens Cloud and navigate to the policy settings for the connected VFree20 device.
Set a policy to lock a specific setting within the Sensors & Presence category to a desired value.
Ensure the policy is saved and applied to the device.
Open the mobile app on the VFree20 device and navigate to the same setting.
Observe whether the setting is locked and what value is displayed.
expected: Sensors & Presence category settings should be lockable to a specific value and that cloud-set value should be enforced on the device.
actual: The setting becomes locked on the mobile app but retains the phone's previously selected value instead of applying the value set in the cloud policy.
